Off Calendar May-04-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as to DEFENDANT CANUS CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Responses as follows: The motion is taken off calendar by agreement of the parties. Case resolved. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT CANUS CORPORATION'S Demurrer To the second, third, fourth and sixth causes of action in the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
